name: json-payload-post
description: Send the active JSON file as a POST payload to a configurable endpoint, inspect the response inline, and save it to disk.

jsonPayloadPost.url.description: Primary URL the JSON payload is POSTed to. Also used by the editor title-bar button.

jsonPayloadPost.secondaryUrl.description: Secondary URL for sending the same JSON to a second server (optional).

jsonPayloadPost.timeoutMs.description: Request timeout in milliseconds. Set to 0 to disable the timeout.

jsonPayloadPost.decodeBase64.description: Force every response to be base64-decoded into the real file before saving/opening/comparing. Usually unnecessary: responses with a 'Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64' header are decoded automatically, and base64-looking bodies offer a one-click 'Decode & re-send'. Enable this only for servers that return base64 without that header.

jsonPayloadPost.diffPdfMarkDifferences.description: Pass --mark-differences to diff-pdf so differing regions are marked with a rectangle in the comparison view.

jsonPayloadPost.autoSaveFileResponses.description: Automatically open the Save As dialog when a response is a file (binary, base64-decoded, or an attachment). Off by default so it doesn't interrupt the two-server compare workflow.
